docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [LILY ALEMAYEHU APPEARING ON BEHALF OF AMAZON.COM] FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM,INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM,INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHIKONG CHEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMAZON.CONM, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYEHU. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING 5/22/24 AT 8:30AM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM,INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, CHIKONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM,INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.
